problem id: b595b6e8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  11010111 -> 01110001
  00101010 -> 10000000
  11111011 -> 10110000
  11010001 -> 00010000
  01010110 -> 00000000
  01010011 -> 00010000
  10100010 -> 00100000
  00110011 -> 00000000
  01000000 -> 00000000

query: 11101010
predicted answer: 10100000
